messages.content: Name some examples of geo fissures
Some examples of geo fissures are the Sierra Nevada Mountains, the Rocky Mountains, the Black Hills, the Appalachian Mountains, and the Sierra de la Demanda.
A geo fissure is a deep crack in the Earth's crust, created by tectonic plates pulling apart from each other. It is also known as a rift or a fracture.
